---
title: "Manuscript figures (dataset 1)"
author: "SK"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  rmdformats::robobook:
    highlight: kate
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
.libPaths(new = "/mnt/nfs/simo/rpack_4_4/")
library(ggplot2)
library(ggforce)
library(patchwork)
library(reshape2)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(cellmig)
library(rstan)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```


```{r}
d1 <- get(load("data/dataset_1.RData"))
rm(d)
```


```{r}
sim <- cellmig::gen_full(control = list(N_biorep = 3, 
                                        N_techrep = 3,
                                        N_cell = 1000,
                                        N_group = 5,
                                        prior_alpha_p_M = -0.5,
                                        prior_alpha_p_SD = 1,
                                        prior_kappa_mu_M = 1.5,
                                        prior_kappa_mu_SD = 1,
                                        prior_kappa_sigma_M = 0,
                                        prior_kappa_sigma_SD = 1,
                                        prior_sigma_bio_M = 0,
                                        prior_sigma_bio_SD = 1,
                                        prior_sigma_tech_M = 0,
                                        prior_sigma_tech_SD = 1,
                                        prior_mu_group_M = 0,
                                        prior_mu_group_SD = 1))
```
```{r}
y <- sim$y$v
```


```{r}
w <- sample(y, size = nrow(d1), replace = F)
w <- round(w, digits = 3)

g_D <- ggplot(data = data.frame(v_sim = w, v_obs = d1$v))+
    geom_point((aes(x = v_obs, y = v_sim)), size = 0.5)+
    geom_density_2d(aes(x = v_obs, y = v_sim), col = "orange")+
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(min(d1$v), max(d1$v)), col = "darkgray")+
    scale_x_log10(name = "Observed v")+
    scale_y_log10(name = "Simulated v", limits = c(0.001, 10^4))+
    annotation_logticks(base = 10, sides = "lb")+
    theme_bw(base_size = 10)
g_D
```


```{r}
ggsave(file = "manuscript_dataset_1/Supplementary_prior_prediction.png", 
       plot = g_D, device = "png", width = 3, height = 3, dpi = 600)
```
